name: io.github.iamvibhorsingh/bbox-mcp-server
description: Geospatial toolkit: bbox conversion, EPSG projections, H3 indexing, Overpass queries, map links

environment_variables.name: MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Mapbox token for natural-language location search (e.g. 'San Francisco')

environment_variables.name: OVERPASS_API_URL
environment_variables.description: Custom Overpass API endpoint URL (defaults rotate between public instances)

environment_variables.name: MAX_H3_CELLS
environment_variables.description: Safety cap for H3 grid generation (default: 50000)
